package rulefixtures

import (
	"database/sql"
)

// scenario for ldap_injection_via_string_concat: string concatenation or `fmt.Sprintf` building LDAP filter strings with user input
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario724Negative(db *sql.DB, userInput string) (*sql.Rows, error) {
	return db.Query("select * from users where name = ?", userInput)
}
